problem id: 39870fb9
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(1) XOR SHR(2)

examples:
  01101100 -> 11000011
  01001000 -> 10000010
  10111001 -> 01011101
  11001101 -> 10101000
  01110110 -> 11110001
  10010110 -> 00001000
  11010001 -> 10010111
  10101001 -> 01111001
  00011111 -> 00111001

query: 11110010
predicted answer: 11011001
